cross_domain_bonus_note: All 8 hypotheses bridge adjacent biomedical sub-disciplines (mechanobiology ↔ epigenomics). Bonus requires 2+ disciplinary boundaries (e.g., materials science → neuroscience). Not applicable here. Cycle 1 applied +0.5 but per v5.8 rule this was an over-application.

ranked_hypotheses.title: HDAC3-NCoR Eraser Depletion by ECM Stiffness Creates Enhancer Stabilization Independent of Writer Activation
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Genuinely orthogonal eraser-depletion model; paradigm inversion; best experimental design (triple orthogonal test); zero citation hallucinations
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: HDAC1/2 compensation; Fu 2024 substrate was Parkin (non-histone), not enhancer H3K27ac

ranked_hypotheses.title: Mechanically-Induced H3K27ac as 6-12h Temporal Window for TET2-Mediated CpG Demethylation and DNA Methylation Mechanical Memory
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: New evidence classes (5hmC DIP-seq, RRBS); internally consistent timescales; priming cycling experiment is elegant; answers fundamental memory question
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: TET2 co-occupancy at stiffness-gained enhancers in hMSCs is entirely parametric

ranked_hypotheses.title: Sequential Two-Phase Bivalent Enhancer Activation: YAP-EP300 Phase 1 (0-4h) Feeds Forward to UTX/MLL3-COMPASS Phase 2 (12-24h) with KDM6A/KDM6B Paralog Disambiguation
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Most mechanistically specific; four-arm siRNA experiment; A-485 timing dissection; UTX-COMPASS well-grounded (Dorighi 2017)
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: UTX-COMPASS recruited independently via MLL3/4 PHD→H3K4me1 may bypass Phase 1 feedforward

ranked_hypotheses.title: Integrated Three-Phase Enhancer Memory Cascade with Strict Feedforward Dependencies Under ECM Stiffness
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Integrates E1-H3+E1-H4; strict feedforward is a falsifiable novel claim; highest impact potential if true
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: UTX independent recruitment; C2-H2 is a superset of E1-H3+E1-H4 — redundant when both parents advance
ranked_hypotheses.demotion_reason: DIVERSITY ADJUSTMENT: C2-H2 directly extends both E1-H3 and E1-H4, which both advance. Sending all three to QG would test overlapping biology. C2-H2 recommended for Cycle 3 if strict feedforward remains untested after QG.

ranked_hypotheses.title: Integrin Force-Induced H3K9me3 Demethylation at Nuclear Interior Enhancers Creates Competence Windows for H3K27ac Activation
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Novel physical force-to-heterochromatin mechanism; Sun 2020 provides direct experimental precedent; DamID-seq nuclear localization adds specificity
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: Sun 2020 used cyclic magnetic bead force, not static ECM stiffness — fundamental methodological question

ranked_hypotheses.title: ECM Stiffness Activates Two Independent H3K27ac Programs (YAP-TEAD and MRTF-SRF) in CTCF-Permitted Loop Domains via NIPBL-Cohesin
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Dual-program (YAP-TEAD + MRTF-SRF) contact network is novel; CTCF-permitted framing is well-grounded; verteporfin vs C3-transferase dissection is elegant
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: HiChIP is technically demanding; empirical survey framing limits mechanistic impact
ranked_hypotheses.promotion_reason: Promoted to replace C2-H2 after diversity adjustment. Distinct mechanism (3D chromatin architecture) from all other advancing hypotheses.

ranked_hypotheses.title: Differential Stiffness Thresholds for YAP-TEAD vs MRTF-SRF Create a Tissue-Stiffness-to-Enhancer Decoder
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Highest testability (9); 7-stiffness-gradient design is elegant and would be definitive
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: MRTF threshold (~5-10 kPa) is entirely parametric with no direct measurement; cardiac fibroblasts require ~25 kPa (same as YAP)
ranked_hypotheses.drop_reason: Below composite threshold (6.1); lowest mechanistic specificity (5); central MRTF threshold claim entirely parametric. Salvageable as supporting experiment for E1-H5.

ranked_hypotheses.title: Acetyl-CoA and α-Ketoglutarate as Metabolic Gatekeepers for the ECM Stiffness-Enhancer Enzyme Cascade
ranked_hypotheses.key_strength: Elegant orthogonal inhibitor dissection; informative even if hypothesis fails
ranked_hypotheses.key_concern: Quantitatively implausible: cofactors 5-100x above enzyme Km — rate-limiting claim fails basic enzyme kinetics
ranked_hypotheses.drop_reason: Lowest composite (5.8); core rate-limiting claim quantitatively implausible (Critic: cofactors 5-100x above Km); metabolic-epigenetic nexus heavily studied with minimal remaining novelty.

diversity_check.cluster_mechanism: temporal_enzymatic_cascade (ECM stiffness → sequential enzyme recruitment → H3K27ac phases)
diversity_check.cluster_convergence_type: C2-H2 is a direct superset of E1-H3 + E1-H4 (explicitly extends both)
diversity_check.action_taken: C2-H2 demoted from evolution selection. E1-H3 and E1-H4 retained as borderline-diverse (different timescales, different readouts, different biological questions). E1-H5 promoted to fill C2-H2's slot.
diversity_check.adjustment_note: E1-H3 (Phase 1-2, hours) and E1-H4 (Phase 3/memory, days-weeks) make genuinely different predictions with different evidence classes. Retaining both provides more experimental information per QG slot than C2-H2 alone.

elo_tournament.diagnostic_note: Perfect agreement across all 6 positions. Implicit dimension surfaced by Elo: methodological accessibility and experimental independence. C2-H6's paradigm-challenging orthogonality drives 100% win rate. E1-H5's HiChIP burden drives 0% win rate — partially captured by Testability=7 but more salient in pairwise comparisons.

selection_rationale: C2-H6 (7.4): Highest composite; genuinely orthogonal eraser mechanism; paradigm-challenging
E1-H4 (7.2): Second highest; new evidence class; answers fundamental memory question
E1-H3 (7.1): Third highest; most mechanistically specific cascade hypothesis; distinct from E1-H4 in timescale and prediction
C2-H7 (6.4): Post-diversity rank 4; only force-direct mechanism; distinct from all signaling-relay models
E1-H5 (6.3): Post-diversity rank 5; promoted over C2-H2; CTCF/3D-architecture mechanism distinct from all others

ranking_metadata.cross_domain_bonus_rule: v5.8 — requires 2+ disciplinary boundaries (not adjacent biomedical sub-disciplines)
